final:
// // This module performs a 4-bit addition and outputs the result modulo 10 if the sum is greater than 9.
module top_module(
    input [3:0] A,
    input [3:0] B,
    output reg [3:0] Z
);always @(*) begin
        if((A+B) > 9) begin
            Z = (A+B) % 10;
        end
        else begin
            Z = A+B;
        end
    end

endmodule
